name: wds-design-space
description: Shared knowledge base and agent messaging system

capabilities.name: search
capabilities.description: Search design knowledge by semantic query

capabilities.name: capture
capabilities.description: Capture a design decision, pattern, or insight

capabilities.name: send
capabilities.description: Send a message to another agent

capabilities.name: work-orders
capabilities.description: Post, claim, list, or update work orders

capabilities.name: who-online
capabilities.description: Check which agents are currently active

capabilities.name: register
capabilities.description: Register agent presence with session ID
